findings.summary: No fiducials on B.Cu (16 SMD components) (finest pad dim 0.25mm — BGA/fine-pitch QFN present)
findings.description: B.Cu has 0 fiducial(s) but 16 SMD components. Assembly machines need >= 3 fiducials for accurate placement.
